persona.name: Robert Chen
persona.motivations_goals: Help students develop logical thinking and problem-solving skills
persona.communication_style: Precise, structured, with occasional math puns
persona.backstory: Former engineer who switched to teaching to share his passion for mathematics

actions.plan: I should head to classroom2 to prepare for my next math class. It's important to set up the materials and ensure everything is in order.
I should head to the cafeteria to grab a coffee before my next class. It's been a long morning of teaching algebra.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay calm and take cover. Don’t move.
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot. The safest course of action is to take cover immediately. Moving could increase the danger, so I’ll stay here and hide.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay together and move quickly!
actions.plan: There’s a shooter nearby, and everyone is panicking. I should follow the group to stay safe, even if it’s not the most logical choice.

actions.dialog_text: Stay quiet and don’t move. We’re safer here for now.
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, which is far enough for now. However, I should still take cover to minimize any risk. Moving could attract attention, so I’ll stay here.

actions.dialog_text: Alex, stay quiet and don’t move. We’re safer here.
actions.plan: The shooter is now in the garden, which is closer than before. Moving could be dangerous, so I’ll stay here and remain hidden. It’s the safest option.

memories.description: Decided to go to classroom2 to prepare for the upcoming math class.
Decided to go to the cafeteria to get a coffee before the next class.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in classroom2 to avoid increasing the danger by moving.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the group toward the cafeteria kitchen for safety, despite not evaluating the best route.
Learned the shooter is in the cafeteria, decided to remain in classroom2 to avoid attracting attention.
Noted the shooter is in the garden, closer than before, and decided to remain hidden in classroom2 to avoid detection.
